message:
feat(connectors): add provisioning automation for final 6 connectors

Implement provisioning recipes, readiness checks, base_url_policy,
and SelfCheckReport for metabase (session token, self-hosted),
duckdb (local embedded, minimal recipe), posthog (API key),
amplitude (API key + secret key), mixpanel (service account),
and segment (write key).

~132 new tests across 6 connectors. All 36 provisioning beads now complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
